staticCommands.description: Use DLL components to generate code

values.name: sourcemodel
values.description: The filename for the source model to use during code generation.

options.description: Path to the locally cached generators
Model name. If included then the output will be limited to the specified model
Settings file to use when generating code. Settings in the file will override arguments on the command line
Specific version to use for the generator
